history.content:
<thought>
I am at row 02 column B, facing right. The cell directly ahead at row 02 column C is lava, so moving forward would be fatal. The goal is at row 04 column D, and a safe path exists by going downward first, but I currently need to change direction to face down. From facing right, turning right will make me face down.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing down. The cell directly ahead at row 03 column B is safe, while moving right would require turning and there is lava nearby. The shortest safe progress toward the goal at row 04 column D is to move forward into row 03 column B.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column B, facing down (`v`). The goal is at row 04 column D. Moving forward would take me to row 04 column B, which is safe, so I should advance toward the goal while avoiding the lava at row 04 column C.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing down (`v`). The goal `O` is at row 04 column D, which is to my right. The cell directly ahead (row 05 column B) is a wall, so moving forward is impossible. I need to turn right to face the goal direction.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing left (`<`). The goal is at row 04 column D, which is to my right. To move toward it safely, I need to face right. From left-facing, turning left will make me face down, so instead I should turn right twice over time; for the next immediate step, the best move is to turn right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B, facing up (`^`). The goal `O` is at row 04 column D. Moving forward would take me to row 03 column B, which is safe but does not move me directly toward the goal. Since I need to head right toward column D, I should turn right to face east.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B, facing right (`>`). The goal `O` is at row 04 column D, but the cell directly ahead at row 04 column C is lava (`L`), so I must not move forward. I need to avoid the lava and find an alternate route, so I will turn to face upward first.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing up (`^`). The goal `O` is at row 04 column D, but the cell directly to my right at column C is lava, so I cannot move straight toward the goal from here. The safe route is to move upward into row 03, then go around the lava to approach the goal from above or the side.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column B facing up (`^`). The goal `O` is at row 04 column D. Moving forward would take me to row 02 column B, which is safe but moves away from the goal. The goal is to my lower-right, so I should turn right to face east and then move toward it while avoiding the lava at row 02 column C and row 04 column C.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column B facing right (`>`). The goal `O` is at row 04 column D. Moving forward would take me to row 03 column C, which is safe and brings me closer to the goal. 
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column C facing right (`>`). The goal `O` is directly below me at row 04 column D, but moving forward would take me to row 03 column D, which is safe and brings me closer to the goal. Going down is not currently possible without turning, so the safest progress is to move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column D, facing right (`>`). The goal `O` is directly below me at row 04 column D. Since moving forward would take me into wall-bound space to the right, I need to turn to face down first. From right to down, I should turn right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column D facing down. The goal `O` is directly below me at row 04 column D, so the safest and most direct move is to go forward into the goal cell.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
